title: Determine the exact value of R(K5, K5-e)
micro_paper_assessment: The exact target remains micro-paper eligible, but this solve pass produced only a support-level structural slice and no exact closure or witness.
generalization_signal: moderate; the common-neighborhood obstruction template scales, but the matching conclusion is specific to K5-e
candidate_theorem_slice: In any graph G with alpha(G) <= 4 and no K5-e, the common neighborhood of an edge is a matching; hence every edge has codegree at most 8 and every vertex neighborhood has maximum degree at most 8.
next_action: Obtain or reconstruct a concrete 29-vertex lower-bound witness and run bounded one-vertex extension analysis to 30, then 31, using the derived edge/nonedge codegree filters.
